entry.title: Musk Aura Eau De Parfum 50ml | Long Lasting Premium Fragrance
entry.summary:
Vendor: AL-SAALIM PERFUMES
Type:
Price: 449.00

Musk Aura Eau De Parfum ek premium fragrance hai jo soft, warm aur long-lasting musk notes ke saath design kiya gaya hai. Iski smooth aur elegant khushboo aapko din bhar fresh aur confident feel karwati hai. Daily wear ho ya special occasions, ye perfume har situation me perfectly suit karta hai. Iska refined blend skin-friendly hai aur long time tak tikta hai, jisse aapko baar-baar apply karne ki zarurat nahi padti.

 

✔ Long Lasting Fragrance
✔ Premium Quality Ingredients
✔ Smooth & Elegant Scent
✔ Ideal for Daily & Occasion Use

entry.title: CR7 Velocity Perfume 50ml | Strong & Fresh Long Lasting Fragrance
entry.summary:
Vendor: AL-SAALIM PERFUMES
Type:
Price: 449.00

CR7 Velocity Eau De Parfum ek bold aur energetic fragrance hai jo fresh aur powerful notes ka perfect combination hai. Ye perfume un logon ke liye perfect hai jo strong personality aur confidence dikhana chahte hain. Iski long-lasting khushboo din bhar freshness banaye rakhti hai aur aapko standout feel karati hai. Office, outings aur daily use ke liye ye ek strong choice hai.

 

✔ Strong & Fresh Fragrance
✔ Long Lasting Performance
✔ Perfect for Men
✔ Daily Use Friendly

✔ Smooth & Pleasant Scent

entry.title: Majmua Attar – 100gm Premium Traditional Blend Fragrance Oil | Al-Saalim Perfumers | Alcohol Free
entry.summary:
Vendor: AL-SAALIM PERFUMES
Type:
Price: 659.00

 Majmua Attar by Al-Saalim Perfumers is a classic and deeply traditional fragrance blend known for its rich, earthy, and spiritual aroma. Crafted with a harmonious mix of woody, herbal, and slightly sweet notes, this attar creates a calm yet powerful presence.

Its long-lasting and concentrated formula makes it ideal for daily wear, prayers, special occasions, and those who appreciate timeless oriental scents. The fragrance develops beautifully on the skin, leaving a warm and memorable trail.

The 100gm pack is perfect for regular personal use and offers excellent value with strong longevity.

• Premium Concentrated Attar

• Traditional Herbal & Woody Blend

• Deep, Rich & Long-Lasting Aroma

• Alcohol Free & Skin Friendly

• Net Quantity: 100gm

entry.title: Oud Qasmi Attar – 100gm Premium Rich & Woody Fragrance Oil | Al-Saalim Perfumers | Alcohol Free
entry.summary:
Vendor: AL-SAALIM PERFUMES
Type:
Price: 659.00

 Oud Qasmi Attar by Al-Saalim Perfumers is a deep, powerful, and luxurious fragrance crafted for those who appreciate the richness of traditional oud. It opens with a bold woody intensity and gradually settles into a warm, smooth, and long-lasting base that leaves a strong impression.

This alcohol-free concentrated perfume oil is ideal for special occasions, evening wear, and festive gatherings. Its classic oriental character makes it especially suitable for oud lovers who prefer a strong and elegant scent profile.

The 100gm pack is perfect for regular use and offers excellent longevity with just a small application.

• Premium Concentrated Attar

• Rich, Woody & Oriental Aroma

• Strong & Long-Lasting Fragrance

• Alcohol Free & Skin Friendly

• Net Quantity: 100gm

This alcohol-free concentrated perfume oil is perfect for daily wear, office use, and special occasions. Its subtle yet long-lasting scent makes it suitable for both men and women who prefer a classy and non-overpowering fragrance.

The 100gm pack is ideal for regular personal use and ensures excellent longevity with just a small application.

Price: 7999.00

Al-Saalim Premium Attar Oil is a high-quality, concentrated fragrance oil available at ₹8000 per kilogram. Crafted using premium aromatic ingredients, this attar delivers a rich, long-lasting, and luxurious fragrance experience. The alcohol-free formula makes it ideal for traditional attar use, perfume manufacturing, and custom fragrance blending.

This bulk fragrance oil is specially suitable for perfume makers, resellers, and businesses looking for strong, pure, and reliable scent quality. The fragrance provides excellent projection and long staying power, making it perfect for daily wear, special occasions, and professional perfume creation.

• Price: ₹8000 per Kg

• Strong & Long-Lasting Aroma

entry.title: Al-Saalim Premium Attar Combo Pack (Pack of 3 – Aseel, White Musk & Signature) | Roll On 6ml Each | Alcohol Free
entry.summary:
Vendor: AL-SAALIM PERFUMES
Type:
Price: 479.00

Enjoy a luxurious fragrance experience with the Al-Saalim Premium Attar Combo Pack, featuring three unique and elegant attars – Aseel, White Musk, and Signature. This special combo is crafted for fragrance lovers who want a perfect blend of traditional richness and modern freshness.

Each attar in this combo offers a distinct aroma, giving you the flexibility to choose a fragrance based on your mood, occasion, or preference. These alcohol-free attars are gentle on the skin and provide a smooth, long-lasting scent throughout the day.

This combo is perfect for personal use, gifting, or building your premium attar collection.

Combo Includes

✔ Aseel Attar – Rich, warm & traditional oriental fragrance

✔ White Musk Attar – Clean, soft & refreshing musk aroma

✔ Signature Attar – Classic, smooth & premium elegant fragrance

Key Features

Pack of 3 Premium Attars

Quantity: 6ml Each Bottle

Alcohol Free & Skin Friendly

Long Lasting Fragrance

Premium Roll-On Glass Bottles

Suitable for Men & Women

Perfect for Daily Wear & Special Occasions

Ideal Luxury Gift Set

Why Choose This Combo

Three unique fragrances in one pack

Balanced combination of fresh, warm, and elegant aromas

Premium quality traditional attars

Great value for money

How to Use

Apply lightly on pulse points such as wrists, neck, or behind the ears for a long-lasting fragrance.

entry.summary:

Price: 179.00

  Experience elegance and charm with Shanaya Attar by Al-Saalim Perfumers.

Shanaya is a beautifully crafted fragrance with a soft, sweet, and slightly floral aroma, designed to feel graceful and luxurious.

This attar is perfect for those who enjoy smooth, feminine, and classy scents. It is suitable for daily wear, special occasions, festive events, and evening use. The alcohol-free formula ensures it is gentle on the skin while offering a long-lasting and pleasant fragrance.

Key Features

Fragrance Type: Soft, Sweet & Floral

Quantity: 6 ml Roll On

Alcohol Free

Long Lasting & Elegant Aroma

Premium glass roll-on bottle

Suitable for women & those who prefer soft fragrances

Why Choose Shanaya Attar

Graceful and luxurious fragrance

Perfect for daily wear and special moments

Skin-friendly and non-irritating

Premium packaging, ideal for gifting

How to Use

Apply lightly on pulse points such as the neck, wrists, or behind the ears for a lasting and elegant fragrance.
